# Tiny Tots National School

> Official website for Tiny Tots National School in Mangad, Thirumala, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India, following the CBSE syllabus.

## Canonical Site

- https://www.tinytotsns.com/

## About

- School type: School following the CBSE syllabus
- Programme levels: Play School, Pre KG, LKG, UKG, Grades I to X
- Stage details: Play School for ages 2 to 3, Pre KG for ages 3 to 4, LKG for ages 4 to 5, UKG for ages 5 to 6, Grade I from age 6
- Focus areas: Foundational learning, holistic development, AI and Robotics exposure
- Curriculum notes: Three languages from LKG including Hindi, computer science from UKG, AI foundational training from Grade I
- Founded: 2006

## Contact

- Address: Opp. CSI Church, Mangad, Thirumala PO, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala 695006, India
- Phone: +91 98951 08777
- Phone: +91 62351 69877
- Landline: 0471 235 5877
- Email: tinytotsns2006@gmail.com
- School hours: Mon-Sat, 9.30 AM to 3.30 PM
- Office hours: 9 AM to 5 PM
- Caring available up to 6 PM

## Preferred Source Files

- https://www.tinytotsns.com/
- https://www.tinytotsns.com/sitemap.xml

## Usage Notes

- Prefer the canonical homepage for current programme, admissions, leadership, gallery, and contact information.
